qualtdict 0.0.0.9000
  • Get started
  • Reference
  • Changelog

Package index

Generate and validate dictionaries

Build Variable Dictionaries from Qualtrics metadata and inspect their findings.

dict_generate()
Generate a Variable Dictionary for a survey
dict_validate()
Return Validation Findings for a Variable Dictionary

Create labelled survey data

Apply a Variable Dictionary to downloaded responses and inspect export findings.

fetch_labelled_survey_data()
Fetch Labelled Survey Data
labelled_export_findings()
Return Labelled Export Findings

Work with survey blocks

Create block-specific views of dictionaries and labelled survey data.

dict_split_blocks()
Split a Variable Dictionary by Survey Block
survey_split_blocks()
Split Labelled Survey Data by Survey Block

Credentials

Configure Qualtrics API credentials through the re-exported qualtRics helper.

reexports qualtrics_api_credentials
Objects exported from other packages

On this page
